### Post by thered on 2009-02-08
Can any one tell me if my ddclient conf file reads correctly?

# Configuration file for ddclient generated by debconf
#
# /etc/ddclient.conf

pid=/var/run/ddclient.pid
protocol=dyndns2
use=if, if=update.opendns.com
server=www.opendns.com
login=myusername
password='xxxxxxx'
mydns.opendns.com

Is tghere anything else I should do?

### Post by thered on 2009-02-08

### Post by FishRCynic on 2009-02-08
> **thered said:**
> Can any one tell me if my ddclient conf file reads correctly?

# Configuration file for ddclient generated by debconf
#
# /etc/ddclient.conf

pid=/var/run/ddclient.pid
protocol=dyndns2
use=if, if=update.opendns.com
server=www.opendns.com
login=myusername
password='xxxxxxx'
mydns.opendns.com

Is tghere anything else I should do?

try adding

daemon=600
cache=/tmp/ddclient/.cache


i use dyndns
so my use maybe different

use=web, web=checkip.dyndns.com, web-skip=' IP Address'


hope this helps
